decisions.decision: Sprint stats join on sprint_name (not sprint_id)
decisions.rationale: 71% of bugs have sprint_id=NULL — sprint_name is reliable in both tables. Verifier flagged as regression but is intentional documented decision.

decisions.decision: state=active,closed,future in Jira Board Sprint API
decisions.rationale: Without it Jira omits closed sprints
If Jira unreachable, serve cached data with stale:true banner

decisions.decision: fetchStats + fetchSprints both call POST /api/sync first
decisions.rationale: Refresh Data must pull from Jira, not just re-read stale local DB

decisions.decision: Dashboard sidebar restored with Sprint link using projects[0].key per D-07
decisions.rationale: Was deleted by aade1e1 commit — sidebar required for navigation to Sprint page
Export buttons exist in UI as no-ops; real implementation is Phase 05
WSL2 NTFS path pollution causes worktree files tracked in commits

context_notes: Phase 04 fully closed this session. Hotfix code review found 3 blockers (all fixed): KeyError on HTTPException.detail, missing encodeURIComponent in BugReportPage, stale banner hidden by error flag. Verifier found Dashboard sidebar missing (restored from commit 59c7e42). Sprint_name join is intentional — verifier WR-06 note is a false alarm. Phase 05 (Export) is next — Export buttons exist as stubs in both BugReport and Sprint pages, ready to wire up.
